SEARCH
Module overrungl.opengl
Package overrungl.opengl

Interface GL15C

All Superinterfaces:
overrun.marshal.DirectAccess
All Known Subinterfaces:
GL, GLLegacy
public interface GL15C extends overrun.marshal.DirectAccess
The OpenGL 1.5 forward compatible functions.

These extensions are promoted in this version:

  • GL_ARB_occlusion_query
  • GL_ARB_vertex_buffer_object
Since:
0.1.0
Author:
squid233
